sections.paragraph:
ἀποίητος, ον (ποιητός ‘made’, s. ποιέω; in var. senses, e.g. Pind., O. 2, 16 ‘undone’=ἄπρακτον; StudPal XX, 144, 9 of wine inadequately fermented; Pind. et al.) not made, uncreated in wordplay of God ἀποίητος ὸ̔ς πάντα ἐποίησεν PtK 2 p. 13, 26.—DELG s.v. ποιέω.

var. var. = various(ly)

e.g. e.g. = exempli gratia (for example)

Pind Pind , V b.c.—List 5

StudPal StudPal = CWessely, Studien zur Paläographie und Papyrusurkunden—List 4

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PtK PtK = Petruskerygma (Preaching of Peter)—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 111
